candidates.why: Current-assets related line but not the total; less appropriate than the explicit total.
Component of current assets, not total current assets.
Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid Expenses and Other Current Assets - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not a reported total.
Balancing item, not a reported financial statement line.
Wrong section and balancing item.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash at bank and in hand
candidates.why: Balance-sheet cash line and best match for cash and cash equivalents among provided labels.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow roll-forward opening balance, not preferred when balance-sheet cash exists.

candidates.row_label: Exchange gains/losses on cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Not a cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Could equal year-end cash, but balance-sheet line is preferred for CHE.
Not a balance-sheet cash balance.

final_choice.row_label: Cash at bank and in hand

variables.notes: Preferred balance-sheet cash balance selected over cash-flow ending cash.

candidates.why: Only interest-bearing current liabilities component, not total current liabilities.
Only one component/subtotal of current liabilities.
Only non-interest-bearing current liabilities component, not total.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not reported total.
Wrong section and balancing item.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt; fits STD definition.
Cash flow movement, not a balance-sheet debt stock.

Current interest-bearing liabilities on the balance sheet; likely captures short-term debt and is preferable as a clean total when available, though wording could include more than debt. Chosen as priority because it appears to be the reported current borrowing total.
Appears under current liabilities in several years and represents borrowings to banks; useful fallback where current interest-bearing liabilities total is not separately shown.

variables.notes: R:c. Priority list reflects label changes over time. Use only one applicable row per year to avoid double counting: prefer 'Current liabilities,Interest bearing liabilities' when present; otherwise use current 'Liabilities to credit institutions, interest-bearing'; use 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' only when that is the identifiable current debt line. Manual review because the repeated label 'Liabilities to credit institutions, interest-bearing' also appears in non-current section in some years, creating ambiguity.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Direct balance-sheet PPE line; best match for PPE net/total.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipmen
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Disposal flow, not PPE balance.

candidates.row_label: Total Intangible Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Intangibles and balancing item, not PPE.
Wrong asset class.

candidates.row_label: Impairment of PPE and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Expense/adjustment line, not PPE balance.
Wrong asset class and flow line.
Wrong asset class and flow line.
Exact match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes; not the final net operating cash flow.
Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.
Header/reconciliation label, not the net cash flow figure.
Component/other line, not total operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
